title: Perfectly Crunchy Dutch Pretzels Toast
description: A fresh and shattering Dutch dish featuring pretzels and toast, friendly to the ayurvedic-rajasic diet, perfect for a crunchy snack.

ingredients.name: grated cheese
ingredients.notes: optional, but recommended for extra flavor

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the whole wheat bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
Butter each slice of toasted bread generously.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the buttered bread.
Crush the pretzels into small pieces and sprinkle over the sesame seeds.
Sprinkle salt to taste over the pretzels.
If using grated cheese, sprinkle it over the pretzels.
Place the bread slices on a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the pretzels are crunchy.
Remove from the oven and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
